name: Pendulum Move
description: Drag transition where the window swings a few degrees against the direction of travel, like a card carried by its top edge, and settles upright with a spring when you let go. Maximum angle, sensitivity and the pivot height are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Maximum angle
parameters.description: Furthest the window may swing from upright (degrees)

parameters.name: Sensitivity
parameters.description: How much swing a given drag speed produces

parameters.name: Pivot height
parameters.description: Where the swing hinges, from the top edge (0) to the bottom edge (1)
